title: rubus × barthianus
intro: Rubus × barthianus, also known as the raspberry-lemon hybrid, is a plant species that combines the characteristics of raspberries and lemons. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its high content of antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals. The health benefits of Rubus × barthianus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support digestive function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues.
